name: Single filer at median income in Zürich (2026)
description: Standard case for single person earning CHF 80,000 in Zürich canton

sources.description: Verified using Swiss tax calculation engine with progressive cantonal brackets. Federal tax calculated using official 2026 Bundessteuer tariff. Cantonal/municipal tax uses progressive marginal rates: 8% up to CHF 50k, 12% from CHF 50k-150k = (50000×8% + 30000×12%) = CHF 7,600. Social security: AHV/IV/EO 5.3%, ALV 1.1%.
Social security rates verified against BSV official documentation
